description: Python Code Statistics Utility - CLI tool to calculate line statistics for Python files.

userStories.title: Implement Core Logic for File Statistics Analysis
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to parse a single Python file to count total lines, blank lines, comment lines, and actual code lines.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement analyze_file(filepath: str) -> dict in tools/code_stats.py
Count total, blank, comment and code lines correctly

userStories.title: Add Directory Scanning and CLI Interface
userStories.description: As a user, I want a CLI interface to run the analysis on a file or a folder and print the results as JSON.

userStories.title: Write Unit Tests for Code Statistics Utility
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want unit tests for the statistics utility to verify correct counts for various file cases.
